comment: String Sense ships an AgeOfFlax compat that hands its crude flax-cord tier over to the bundle chain, but it is keyed to modid 'ageofflax' and never fires for Rudiments (the renamed successor). Mirror it here: with Rudiments, vanilla flax drops bundles instead of strands, so String Sense's flax strands are unobtainable — disable the item (which also drops every recipe referencing it, including its strand-retting shortcuts, regardless of String Sense's ConfigLib toggles) and bridge rippled bundles into its cord tier instead.
Strands -> flax cord grid entry; disabled for log hygiene (it would be dropped anyway once the item is gone).

The bridge: crude flax cord twists straight from rippled (unretted) bundles — same recipe String Sense gives AgeOfFlax. The full ret/dry/break/scutch/hatchel chain remains the only route to proper twine.
